free_text: Distorted wave Born approximation analysis for the
O-16(He-3,A)O-15 reaction
Ein Shams University, Cairo
INSTITUTE, REFERENCE FACILITY, and
and REACTION are corrected.
Changed to lowercase and 4-digits year.
8-O-16 gas cell at a pressure of 15 torr, no window
No error analysis of the incident particle energy
and data are given by the authors.
only error ranges of the data are shown by the
authors. the middle point value of error bar was
assumed as data point by compilers.
